name: Simparica (Sarolaner) Chewables For Dog 5-10kg
description: Simparica (Sarolaner) Chewables for Dogs 5–10kg Fast-acting monthly protection against fleas and ticks in a tasty chew. Simparica is a flavorful, once-a-month chewable tablet designed to protect dogs from fleas and ticks for a full 30 days . Suitable for dogs weighing 5–10 kg , Simparica starts killing fleas within 3 hours and ticks within 8 hours of administration. It’s an easy, stress-free alternative to topical treatments no mess, no residue, just simple dosing your dog will love. Simparica works even after bathing or swimming and remains effective for a month. It helps treat and prevent flea infestations and provides consistent tick control, including protection against brown dog ticks , lone star ticks , and black-legged ticks . Key Benefits: Starts killing fleas fast — within 3 hours Eliminates ticks quickly — within 8 hours Monthly chewable with broad-spectrum coverage Stays effective through baths and water exposure Tasty, easy-to-administer chew Dosage & Administration: Administer orally once a month with or without food This chew is specifically formulated for dogs weighing 5–10 kg Ensure accurate dosing based on your dog’s weight Active Ingredient: Sarolaner – A powerful isoxazoline compound that disrupts the nervous system of fleas and ticks, leading to rapid death.   Possible Side Effects: Reported side effects are uncommon but may include: Vomiting Diarrhea Lethargy Tremors Loss of appetite Incoordination (ataxia) Precautions: Use with caution in dogs with a history of seizures or neurological disorders Not for use in puppies under 8 weeks of age or weighing less than 1.3 kg For dog use only – not safe for cats Storage Instructions: Store below 30°C Keep in original packaging until use Do not use after the expiry date stated on the label Compare With: Simparica offers fast-acting monthly protection and is often compared to other leading brands like NexGard and Bravecto with the added benefit of rapid onset and consistent protection.
